name: Airhead Dryad
description:
Art credit: mysterydad

After defeating the Eye of Cthulhu, you are approached by a strange woman dressed only in vines. She looks lost and says that she was "drawn to you", whatever that means. She's also dumb as a box of rocks and extremely gullible.
